description: Sales ops: pipeline management, forecasting, territory management, compensation

items.name: Pipeline management (funnel)
items.tactic: Track: opportunities in each stage (lead → qual → proposal → negotiation → closed). Target conversion rate per stage. Forecast revenue.

items.name: Sales forecasting
items.tactic: Weighted forecast: (opportunity value × close probability) = revenue forecast. Accuracy improves with data.

items.name: Commission structure optimization
items.tactic: Align incentives: high commission on profitable products, lower on low-margin. Transparent = motivation.
